name: design-tokens
description: Design tokens for iOS and Android — synced from Figma via Tokens Studio

scripts.build:all: npm run build:android && npm run build:ios
scripts.pr-body:android: changelog=$(mktemp) && node scripts/common/create-token-changelog.mjs previous-tokens.json tokens/tokens.json "$changelog" && node scripts/common/create-pr-body.mjs "$changelog"
scripts.pr-body:ios: changelog=$(mktemp) && node scripts/common/create-token-changelog.mjs previous-tokens.json tokens/tokens.json "$changelog" && node scripts/common/create-pr-body.mjs "$changelog"
